narrative:
Perrysburg Twp South (precinct in Wood County) has 1,127 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a clear Republican lean of 11.8 percentage points.
